column1: # Custom partition table for M5StickS3 (8 MB flash).
# Default singleapp (1 MB factory) is too small — release rx-wavsim ELF
# extracts to ~1.77 MB on Xtensa LX7 (vs ~0.9 MB on LX6) due to esp-dsp
# PIE SIMD variants and chip-specific driver code. 2 MB factory leaves
# room for headroom + future feature flags.
